task: Debug and fix Ollama model listing in Configuration Center.
patterns: Identified that the frontend was attempting to fetch models from a non-existent backend route `/api/v1/ollama-models`.
Implemented the missing route in `src/server.ts` using `axios` to fetch tags from the local Ollama API (http://localhost:11434/api/tags).
Handled potential unreachable service errors by returning an empty model list and a descriptive error message to prevent UI crashes.
errors: Initial attempt to use multi_replace_file_content failed due to incorrect line ranges and target content mismatches after a previous edit shifted lines. Corrected by using replace_file_content with updated ranges.
